calendar.matters:
Petition For Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Jul-16-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amy Shelf for Judith Tick and Katerine Tick.

Ms. Shelf provided an endorsed copy of the consent from Eli and stated that he signed it after his 18th birthday. Ms. Shelf also spoke of the deceased Settlor's intent, stated that the remainder Beneficiaries are the petitioners and the Settlor's adult Children, that they are aware of the vulnerability and that the entire family is on board with modification. The Petition for Modification of Trust is under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition For Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Apr-22-2019 Continued To Jul-15-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
